title: Skill-Gen Source Model Picker — Explicit Provider+Model for vSkill CLI Skill Creation
description: Expose an explicit source-model picker on the vSkill CLI skill-creation flow (both Studio UI and CLI). Today `src/eval-server/skill-create-routes.ts:940` hardcodes `provider = body.provider || 'claude-cli'` and ignores model selection. This increment: (1) adds a UI dropdown on `CreateSkillPage.tsx` matching the ComparisonPage pattern, (2) accepts `body.model` in the server route with a claude-cli/sonnet default, (3) persists the last choice via the existing `useStudioPreferences` hook (key `skillGenModel`), (4) adds CLI flag parity (`vskill skill new --provider ollama --model qwen2.5-coder`). This unblocks 0670 T-005 (`--engine=anthropic-skill-creator` accepting any provider/model). NOTE: explicitly disjoint from 0676-skill-gen-model-selection, which targets the separate vskill-platform (verified-skill.com) codebase.

scope.stack: Node 20 + TypeScript 5.7 + Vite 6 + React 19 + Tailwind 4 + Vitest 3 + Playwright

notRelatedTo: 0676-skill-gen-model-selection (that increment targets vskill-platform / verified-skill.com — different codebase, do not conflate)
